title: DomainManifest
description: The optional per-domain manifest.json. Absence of this file means 'manifest features off' — the domain still works on state.md alone. When present, `schema` MUST be set so migrations can run. This is an AGENT-WRITABLE file.

schema.description: Manifest schema version. Current = 1. Readers MUST migrate older versions forward (see VAULT-SPEC.md migration convention).

name.description: Canonical domain key — matches the directory name. Immutable once set.

emoji.description: Single emoji shown in the sidebar.

summary.description: One-line description of what this domain is for.

cli.description: Default engine for chat in this domain.

model.description: Default model id for the chosen CLI. Empty string = CLI's own default.

framework.description: Default response framework id (BLUF, SCQA, ...) or null for none.

lens.description: Default analytical lens id or null for none.

skills.description: Skill ids enabled in this domain (skills/<name>/SKILL.md).

autoState.description: When true, chat turns auto-distill into state.md / decisions.md.

context_score.description: Last computed context score, embedded for offline/UI use. null until first scored.

goals.description: Free-text goals driving this domain. Empty array = no goals yet (penalizes config_completeness).

enabled.description: Whether scheduled heartbeat routines run for this domain.

routines.description: Scheduled background routines (e.g. a weekly review).

id.description: Routine identifier / skill id to run.

enabled.description: Per-routine toggle. Defaults to true when omitted.

keywords.description: Keywords that route an inbound message to this domain.

channels.description: Inbound channels wired to this domain (telegram, email, ...).

default.description: True if this is the fallback domain for unrouted input.

mode.description: 'open' = agents may write outside the strict allow-list with confirmation; 'locked' = agents may only write agent-writable zones.

localOnly.description: When true, this domain never leaves the machine — no cloud engines, no network tools, regardless of global flags.

archived.description: True when the domain has been archived (hidden from the active sidebar but never deleted).

archived_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of archival, or null if not archived.
